description: The ``Format Date Time As Time`` node takes in a DateTime and extra parameters to convert it into a string.

fields.Date: The DateTime to use for this string.
fields.Use24HourClock: The option to make the formatted string have the style of the 24 hour clock.
fields.ShowSeconds: Show seconds in this formatted string.
fields.ShowMilliseconds: Show milliseconds in this formatted string.
fields.FormatProvider:
An object that supplies culture-specific formatting information.

Nodes that output this type can be found in Strings/Localization
fields.* ([[String]]): The string formatted from a DateTime.
